title: Service Controller Design
summary: Design for an operator controller that watches Kubernetes Services and creates DNS entries for LoadBalancer and NodePort types.
notes: Technical design doc with annotation schemas, IP-resolution tables, and validation contracts (SPEC). Status: Approved, but not ADR-formatted (no Decision/Consequences). Path under docs/plans/ and goals-oriented framing gave weaker PRD signal; SPEC chosen on dominant implementation-contract content.
